description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was in autonomous mode while making a right lane change on Montgomery St facing north towards Clay St. A car entered 
traffic from a stop sign intersection on right without stopping and struck the Zoox vehicle's rear passenger side door, causing moderate 
damage. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
